name: HIEMT Luxe RF – HI-EMT + Radio Frequency Body Sculpting Device
shortDescription: The HIEMT Luxe RF is a premium body sculpting device that combines high-intensity electromagnetic muscle stimulation (HI-EMT) with radio frequency (RF) technology. With 4 applicators, 7 Tesla magnetic force, an average of 25% muscle mass increase and 30% fat reduction can be achieved.
description:
The HIEMT Luxe RF is a top-tier body sculpting device that combines two revolutionary technologies: HI-EMT (High-Intensity Electromagnetic) muscle stimulation at 4700W with 7 Tesla magnetic force builds muscle, while the 400W radio frequency (RF) module breaks down fat and firms the skin.

The 4 applicators enable simultaneous use for complex, multi-area treatments. During the 30-minute treatment, electromagnetic waves trigger intense muscle contractions, while the RF heat effect promotes fat cell breakdown and boosts collagen production.

Results show an average of 25% muscle mass increase and 30% fat reduction, with visible changes after just 4 treatments. Non-invasive, painless, with no recovery time.
metaTitle: HIEMT Luxe RF | HI-EMT + RF Combined Body Sculpting | SkinLab Hungary
metaDescription: HIEMT Luxe RF: HI-EMT + radio frequency combined body sculpting. 7 Tesla, 4 applicators, 25% muscle building, 30% fat reduction. Skin firming and muscle building in one.

videoDescription.headline: Why is combined HI-EMT + RF technology the future?
paragraphs: In the body sculpting market, clients are seeking increasingly comprehensive solutions. The HIEMT Luxe RF uniquely combines three effects in a single treatment: muscle building, fat reduction, and skin firming – something that can only be achieved separately with other devices.

The combined HI-EMT + RF technology enables higher treatment prices (35,000–55,000 Ft/session), since the client gets the effect of three treatments in one. With 4 applicators, you can perform 10–16 treatments per day.
The HIEMT Luxe RF is designed for premium salons where clients are willing to pay for the latest technology and the triple effect.

features.title: Triple effect in a single treatment: muscle building + fat reduction + skin firming
features.description:
The HIEMT Luxe RF uniquely combines three technological effects in a single 30-minute treatment.

Benefits of the combined technology:

HI-EMT muscle building – 7 Tesla magnetic force, intense muscle contractions
RF fat reduction – 400W radio frequency heat effect for fat cell breakdown
RF skin firming – collagen stimulation, improved skin elasticity
Average 25% muscle mass increase during treatment course
Average 30% fat reduction in treated areas

features.title: Simultaneous use of 4 applicators
features.description:
The HIEMT Luxe RF features 4 applicators that can be used simultaneously for complex treatment protocols.
4 applicators at once – maximum capacity and efficiency
Parallel treatment of multiple body areas
30-minute treatment time per session
Visible results after just 4 treatments
painlessnon-invasiveno recovery time

features.title: Treatment areas
features.description:
The HIEMT Luxe RF is versatile across various body areas. The RF component is particularly valuable for cellulite reduction and skin firming.
Abdomen and waist – fat reduction, muscle strengthening, more athletic appearance
Buttocks – non-invasive hip-lifting treatment, rounder shapes
Thighs – cellulite reduction, skin firming with RF
Arms and shoulders – muscle strengthening, improved skin elasticity
Pelvic floor – optional applicator for pelvic muscle regeneration

features.title: 3 operating modes for personalized treatment
features.description:
The HIEMT Luxe RF offers three different operating modes, allowing treatment to be tailored to the client's needs and sensitivity.
Sport mode – intensive muscle stimulation for maximum muscle building
Gentle mode – milder stimulation for sensitive areas and beginners
Professional mode – targeted muscle building and body sculpting for advanced clients

features.title: Premium technical specifications
features.description:
Magnetic wave energy: 0–7 Tesla
HI-EMT power: 4700W
RF power: 400W
Frequency: 1–100 Hz, pulse width: 300 µs
10.4" touchscreen, 4 applicators
Dimensions: 1200 x 360 x 520 mm, net weight: 63 kg

features.title: Who is the HIEMT Luxe RF recommended for?
features.description:
Premium aesthetic salons and clinics
Body sculpting centers seeking the most advanced technology
Professionals specializing in cellulite treatment
For the combined need of muscle building + skin firming
Non-invasive buttock firming "hip-lifting" treatments

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the HIEMT Luxe RF device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The training focuses on the combined application of HI-EMT and RF technology, so participants can confidently and professionally deliver combined treatments.
items: Operating principles and parameter settings of HI-EMT technology
Mechanism of action of RF (radio frequency) technology
Techniques for simultaneous use of 4 applicators
Treatment areas: abdomen, buttocks, thighs, arms, pelvic floor
Correct application of 3 operating modes (Sport, Gentle, Professional)
Course design, premium pricing, and client communication
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world, supervised educational environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the HIEMT Luxe RF device.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

faq.question: What's the difference between the HIEMT Luxe RF and regular HIEMT devices?
faq.answer: The HIEMT Luxe RF features a built-in 400W radio frequency (RF) module alongside the HI-EMT electromagnetic muscle stimulation. The RF heat effect promotes fat cell breakdown, boosts circulation, and stimulates collagen production – so skin firming is also part of the treatment. Regular HIEMT devices can only build muscle and reduce fat.

faq.question: How does the combined HI-EMT + RF treatment work?
faq.answer: The HI-EMT component triggers intense muscle contractions with high-energy electromagnetic waves (7 Tesla), increasing muscle mass. Meanwhile, the RF module delivers heat energy to the tissues, accelerating fat cell breakdown and stimulating collagen production for firmer skin. The synergistic effect of both technologies delivers stronger results than either alone.

faq.question: What results can be expected?
faq.answer: An average of 25% muscle mass increase and 30% fat reduction can be achieved during the treatment course. Results are visible after 4 treatments, but for optimal effect, a course of 6–8 sessions is recommended, once per week. The final result peaks 2–4 weeks after completing the course.

faq.question: Who should not receive the treatment?
faq.answer: Not recommended for people with pacemakers, heart conditions, cancer, pregnant or breastfeeding women, diabetics, stroke survivors, or those with metal implants.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: No, the treatment is painless. The muscle contractions are intense but not uncomfortable – similar to the feeling after a strong workout. The RF component may cause a mild warmth sensation, which is pleasant. No anesthesia is needed, and there's no recovery time after treatment.

faq.question: Won't the RF burn the skin?
faq.answer: No, the RF module temperature is precisely controllable, and the device's safety system continuously monitors the temperature. The heat effect causes a pleasant warm sensation that promotes fat breakdown and collagen production without damaging the skin.

faq.question: How quickly does the device pay for itself?
faq.answer: You can charge a higher price for combined HI-EMT + RF treatments: 35,000–55,000 Ft/session. With 4 applicators, you can perform 10–16 treatments per day. The device typically pays for itself within 2–4 months. Use our on-page ROI calculator for exact figures!
